div.h3: Step-by-step partial read handling with buffer state visualization

div.p: TCP is a byte stream — io.ReadFull provides the message boundary semantics that TCP lacks.

ul.li: payload: not yet allocated Invariant: Buffer always contains complete bytes

div.p: TCP may deliver 1, 2, 3, or 4 bytes No guarantee of message boundaries!
Wire: [byte0..byte7] ← First 8 of 16 Wire: [byte8..byte11] ← Next 4 Wire: [byte12..byte15] ← Final 4
Connection closed cleanly or mid-frame → Return error, close connection
length > 10,485,760 bytes (10MB) → Reject to prevent OOM attacks
